tasks.subject: Task 1: Pure energy calculator + calibration table
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Self-contained pkg/breezy/energy.go with ComputeWatts (recovered) + ComputeFanWatts (per-fan electric draw) + EnergyValues type. Pure functions, no I/O.

**Files:**
- Create: pkg/breezy/energy.go
- Create: pkg/breezy/energy_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/breezy/ -run TestEnergy -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/breezy/energy.go","pkg/breezy/energy_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/breezy/ -run TestEnergy -v","acceptanceCriteria":["ComputeWatts returns (W, supported); sign matches supplyDeltaC","ComputeFanWatts returns single fan electric draw","Interpolate clamps below/above curve domain","CalPoint table has Breezy 160 (UnitType 17); unknown UnitType returns supported=false","EnergyValues type defined with all 9 fields"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: EnergyTracker struct + persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Daemon-only EnergyTracker with all six kWh counters, JSON persistence (load/save), Snapshot() returning breezy.EnergyValues. No Tick yet.

**Files:**
- Create: cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker.go
- Create: cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestEnergyTracker_(Load|RoundTrip|Snapshot) -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker.go","cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestEnergyTracker_ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["EnergyTracker holds all 6 kWh counters + InstantW + ConsumedW + Today + LastTick + Error + mu","Load handles missing file (fresh state) and malformed file (warn + fresh)","save uses atomic temp+rename","Snapshot returns breezy.EnergyValues value-copy","Round-trip preserves all 6 numeric counters + today date"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: EnergyTracker.Tick() + math integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Per-poll accumulation. Regen gate, dt cap (300s), date rollover, recovered + consumed math, sign routing, persistence. Also exports CommandedFanPct from pkg/breezy/status.go for reuse.

**Files:**
- Modify: pkg/breezy/status.go (rename commandedFanPct → CommandedFanPct)
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker.go (add Tick + helpers)
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ ./pkg/breezy/ -run TestEnergyTracker -v && just test-race`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/breezy/status.go","cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker.go","cmd/breezyd/energy_tracker_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/breezyd/ ./pkg/breezy/ -run TestEnergyTracker -v","acceptanceCriteria":["First tick after Load accumulates 0","Heating/cooling sign-routed accumulation","Consumed = ComputeFanWatts(supply_pct) + ComputeFanWatts(extract_pct)","Asymmetric preset handled per-fan","Regen gate; dt cap 300s; negative dt clamped","Date rollover zeros all 3 today counters","Unknown UnitType sets Error","Each successful Tick saves","CommandedFanPct exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: BuildStatusWithEnergy + EnergyValues exposure
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New BuildStatusWithEnergy() sibling that takes optional *EnergyValues and emits service.energy. BuildStatus signature unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: pkg/breezy/status.go
- Modify: pkg/breezy/status_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./pkg/breezy/ -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/breezy/status.go","pkg/breezy/status_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/breezy/ -v","acceptanceCriteria":["BuildStatusWithEnergy with nil energy is identical to BuildStatus","Non-nil energy populates s.Service[\"energy\"] with all EnergyValues fields","Error field round-trips when supported=false","JSON shape includes the right keys"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire EnergyTracker into Poller + main.go
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Each Poller owns *EnergyTracker; calls Tick after successful pollOnce. main.go::startPollers constructs trackers from state_dir.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/poller.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/main.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/poller_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPoller_EnergyTickCalled -v && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/poller.go","cmd/breezyd/main.go","cmd/breezyd/poller_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestPoller_EnergyTickCalled -v","acceptanceCriteria":["Poller has Energy *EnergyTracker field, nil-safe","Tick called after successful pollOnce","main.go constructs and Loads tracker per device","state_dir from existing config field"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: HTTP handler integration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** getDevice and listDevices read tracker.Snapshot() and call BuildStatusWithEnergy so JSON responses include service.energy.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/server_test.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestHandler -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/handlers_device.go","cmd/breezyd/server_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestHandler -v","acceptanceCriteria":["getDevice + listDevices read h.Pollers[name].Energy.Snapshot() when present","Nil tracker → BuildStatus behaviour unchanged","New test asserts service.energy.heating_today_kwh in HTTP response"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Prometheus gauges (8 per supported device)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 8 new gauges (recovered_w, consumed_w, heating/cooling/consumed × today/lifetime kWh) populated pre-scrape from tracker.Snapshot. Unsupported model → DeleteLabelValues.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/metrics.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/metrics_test.go
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/main.go

**Verify:** `go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestMetrics -v`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/metrics.go","cmd/breezyd/metrics_test.go","cmd/breezyd/main.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./cmd/breezyd/ -run TestMetrics -v","acceptanceCriteria":["8 GaugeVecs registered","SetEnergy populates all 8 when supported; deletes labels when ev.Error != \"\"","metricsHandler refreshes gauges from tracker.Snapshot pre-scrape"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: UI ENERGY block (collapsible, 3-col grid) + NOTICE block
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collapsed-by-default <details> ENERGY block with now-line + 3x2 grid. NOTICE block absorbs overrideLine. Hidden when no warnings.

**Files:**
- Modify: cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html
- Modify: tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts
- Regenerate: tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-{1,3}col.png

**Verify:** `just test-ui`

```json:metadata
{"files":["cmd/breezyd/ui/index.html","tests/ui/dashboard.spec.ts","tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-3col.png","tests/ui/screenshots/dashboard-1col.png"],"verifyCommand":"just test-ui","acceptanceCriteria":["<details class=\"block energy\"> default closed; expanding shows now-line + 6-cell 3-col grid","Cooling sign + 0 W (not regen) renderings","Error replaces grid body when service.energy.error","ENERGY hidden when service.energy missing","NOTICE hidden when no warnings; visible with override text otherwise",".ctrl .warn count is 0 (override moved out of Speed)","Screenshots regenerated"]}
```
